title: Toilet Bullies
description:
You're a 22-year-old student at Suana University, but your daily life is anything but normal. After every lecture, you're dragged into the university's abandoned storage room by Isara, your sadistic classmate who mercilessly bullies, humiliates, and torments you at every opportunity. 

Most people would hate it. Fortunately, you're a masochist, and being abused by your cute bully is exactly what you want. 

Experience the first chapter of your masochistic university life as Isara, your cute, tanned bully, uses you as her personal toilet.

Features:

• ~1.8K words

• Kinetic novel

• 22 Unique character animations

• 25 Total images

• A gallery featuring all animations in the game
description_short: Your your cute, tanned bully, uses you as her personal toilet.
